disputed_language: Resource type supports the chosen principal type
explanation: Sharing to an organization or OU is not available merely because the resource type supports that principal. AWS requires resource sharing with Organizations to be enabled through AWS RAM, the organization to have all features enabled, and the RAM service-linked role to exist; enabling trusted access only from Organizations is insufficient.
required_action: Add the Organizations-sharing and all-features prerequisites to applicability/account-configuration sensitivity, while retaining the supported-resource/principal qualification.
suggested_revision: For supported resource types, AWS RAM can share with accounts in an OU when sharing with AWS Organizations is enabled through AWS RAM and the organization has all features enabled.

supporting_source.locator: Enable resource sharing within AWS Organizations > Requirements and Important; Create a resource share > Considerations
supporting_source.title: Sharing your AWS resources
